# Polish SoftwareEngineering Diagrams 1 and 3

## Goal

Improve diagram 1 (`UML 类图`) and diagram 3 (`0 层 DFD`) so lines, labels, text, and boxes are cleaner and do not overlap or exceed their visual boundaries.

## What I Already Know

* Diagram 1 is `SoftwareEngineering/generated/images/01_uml_class_diagram.png`.
* Diagram 3 is `SoftwareEngineering/generated/images/03_level0_dfd.png`.
* Both diagrams are generated by `SoftwareEngineering/generate_dorm_repair_report.py`.
* The user reported small issues around lines, text, and frame ranges.

## Requirements

* Adjust diagram 1 relationship lines and labels so they do not collide with class boxes or each other.
* Adjust diagram 1 class box text spacing so attributes/methods stay inside compartments.
* Adjust diagram 3 data-flow line routing and label placement so arrows do not clutter processes/data stores.
* Keep diagram semantics unchanged and consistent with the report.
* Regenerate both `.docx` outputs and affected PNGs.
* Commit and push the update.

## Acceptance Criteria

* [x] Diagram 1 has no obvious label/line overlap with class boxes or text compartments.
* [x] Diagram 3 has clearer flow routing and labels placed away from boxes/arrowheads.
* [x] Generated Word files remain valid zip/OpenXML and contain 8 embedded images.
* [x] Changes are committed and pushed.

## Technical Notes

* Added helper functions for label placement and polyline arrows in `SoftwareEngineering/generate_dorm_repair_report.py`.
* Diagram 1 relationship lines were rerouted with controlled line segments and labels/multiplicity positions.
* Diagram 3 DFD flows were rerouted with orthogonal polylines and manual label positions.
